outputs.judgment_summary: Wave 0 (Contract Freeze / Scaffold) executed cleanly. Both work packets succeeded and all verification checks passed. The mission has produced two fresh TypeScript contract artifacts: mission_types.ts and artifact_types.ts. Both gates merged with all_in_scope=true. The plan budget was respected (1 wave, 2 packets) and only allowed files were touched. The mission is ready for post-run workflow replay validation.
